title: wolfhsm: client parameter threaded through every key method
description: Every crypto operation requires passing &mut Client explicitly (e.g. key.sign_digest(&mut client, digest)). This inverts the RustCrypto receiver/argument convention where methods are called on the key or primitive itself. The underlying constraint is real (one in-flight request over a stateful socket), but the ergonomic cost is high and the shape will be unfamiliar to anyone coming from RustCrypto.
notes: NEEDS HUMAN DECISION: client-as-parameter vs. associated-client shape. See issue description for options. No unilateral change at 0.1.0.
